index.title: Atuqtakhanik Numiktiriji
index.description: Angmaqlugu qaritauyakkut-numiktiqhimayut pull requests ikayuutinun tutquumaviinun quyaginaq tutquumaviit, quyaginaq ihuaqhaidjutini.
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, tukiliurutit, dry run
index.lede: Resource Translator angmaqhiyuq qaritauyakkut-numiktiqhimayunik pull requests ikayuutinun tutquumavingnun atuqhugu Azure AI Translator haffumuuna ilitariyauhimayukkut SDK — aallanik kivgaqtuutiqangituq, havauhighainnaq.
index.workflowBody: Ililugu qanuriliurutikhaq tadja CI-mut, tikkuarlugu Azure AI Translator-mut, imaalu repo uqaqtitlugu tamainnik uqauhirnik pinahuaqtarnik.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Iliuraqlugu .github/resource-translator.yml ilaliutilugit globs, tukiliurutit, unalu Custom Translator katitirviit.

glossary.title: Tukiliurutit-ilihimaniq
glossary.body: Kiluuttarlugit qanurittut atiit hunavaluillu tainiit smart word-boundary regex munarivaktait C++, .NET, ilannallu.

dryRun.title: Dry-run + soft-fail
dryRun.body: Naunaiyaqlugit numiktiqhimayut titiraqhimaitumik titiqanik, uvaluuniin nuitiqlugit tamaita ihuiguhuutit qayagidjutigilugit uuktuqtilutit.

outputs.title: PR-friendly outputs
outputs.body: summary-title, summary-details, unalu has-new-translations iliuraqhimayut talvunga create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Havaktauhimayuq uvani @azure-rest/ai-translation-text + @azure/core-rest-pipeline — inmigut uuktuffaarutit uvani 408/429/5xx, piqangituq algakkut aulayumik HTTP. esbuild-bundled, audit-clean.

getting-started.title: Aullaqtiutikhanut
getting-started.lede: Ilaliutilugu workflow file, tikkuarlugu Azure AI Translator naunaitkutainut, qanuriliurutikhaq — piliuqtauhimajuq uumani Microsoft's ilitarijauhimajuq @azure-rest/ai-translation-text SDK — aadjiliurniaqtaa tutquumavik pivikhanik uqauhikkut atuqtakhanik tutquumaviinnik imaalu tujurlugit numiktitiqhimajut.

provision.title: Pivikhaqaqtittilutik Azure AI Numiktiriyimut ikayuutiqhamik
provision.body: Piliurlutit Azure AI Translator atuqtakhanik Azure portal-mi, ahiit tutqurlugit hapkuat imaatut GitHub repository aallanut uqaqtailiniit workflow taigurianginni:

resource.title: Commit a source resource file
resource.body: Ikayuutikkut tutquumaviit atuqhugit Atia. <sourceLocale>. <ext> katimaqyuagutit. Uuktuutigilugu Greetings.en.resx imaatut Greetings.fr.resx, Greetings.de.resx, taimaatullu aqpahuirumik.

output.title: Ihivriuqlugu piliurninnga
output.body: Havauhiq iniqqat, hulidjutit tautuktitiyut pingahunik outputnik iliugaqtaaqtatit PRmun naunaiyautainun: summary-title, summary-details, unalu has-new-translations. Titiraqpaktuqlu Markdown naittumik havaamut makpirvianut talvuuna core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Tukliit Havaktauniaqtun
nextSteps.recipes: Takulugit igadjutikhat monorepos-mut, custom glossaries, unalu Custom Translator katitirviit.

configuration.title: Ihuaqhaininnga
configuration.lede: Express defaults atauhiinnarmik talvani .github/resource-translator.yml imaalu tamaita workflows tunijaupkarlugit. Hulidjutikkut ihumagiyauyut akimayut tamangnik tuniyaugaangamik.

inputs.title: Iliuraiyut aniyullu
inputs.lede: Tamaita iliuraqtauhimayut piyauhimayut piyakhani repo config tutquumaviani. Tamarmik ihuaqhikpata, qanuriliurutikhaq iliuraidjutaa akimajuq.

formats.title: Tutquumaviit Ihuaqhautait
formats.lede: Siksit utiffaaqtaaqtut ikayuutikkut atugahat. Hulidjutit taiguaqhugit attautit pidjutait-nayugait tutquumaviit, numiktiqhugit akiit, uvalu titiraqhugit nukaqhiit tugaaqhimayunun nayugainun.

recipes.title: Igadjutikhat
recipes.lede: Atuqtauluaqtut atugahat tuyungnikkut numiktiqhimayut: monorepos, tukihidjutit, ihuaqhaqhimayut qanuriniit, paniupayut, nipaitigut munaridjutit.

faq.title: APIRHUUTAUQATAAQTUT
faq.lede: Qilamik kiudjutit apirhuutinun tapkua atuqtauluaqtut atuligaangamigit hulidjutit.

contributing.title: Tunihimaaqtun
contributing.lede: Bug unniudjutit, feature requests, imaalu pull requests tamaita tunngahuktitaujut. Hulidjutit mikiyut ilaranaitut hivuliqmik ikayuqtunun.

changelog.title: Aallannguqtirutit
changelog.lede: Anginiqhakkut naittut tuhaqtidjutit. Tamna canonical, atanniqtuidjutiqaqtuq aallannguqtirutinga ittuq CHANGELOG.md tutquumavingani.
